Retriever_1_message:
I executed this query to retrieve the required data:

'''SQL
SELECT
    p.category,
    SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN s.On_Promo = 1 THEN s.Total_Sale_Value ELSE 0 END) AS promo_revenue,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN s.On_Promo = 1 THEN s.Total_Sale_Value ELSE 0 END) *
          100.0 / SUM(s.Total_Sale_Value), 2) AS promo_revenue_share_percentage
FROM
    sales s
JOIN
    products p ON s.SKU_Coded = p.SKU_Coded
WHERE
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s.Sold_Date) = 2023
GROUP BY
    p.category
ORDER BY
    promo_revenue_share_percentage DESC
'''
